targetDoc.title: Short Content Document
targetDoc.description: Inbox items below the routing threshold are written here.
targetDoc.placeholder: Search and bind a SiYuan document

telegramTargetDoc.title: Bound Document
telegramTargetDoc.description: Uses the Siyuan Inbox short content document by default; optionally bind another document.
telegramTargetDoc.fallback: Using Siyuan Inbox short content document
telegramTargetDoc.placeholder: Search and bind a SiYuan document

authorizedUser.title: Authorized User
authorizedUser.description: Only process messages from this Telegram user. Leave blank for all.

inboxWordLimit.title: Long Content Routing Threshold
inboxWordLimit.description: Items above this character count are long content. Set to 0 to write all items into the short content document.

targetNotebook.title: Long Content Notebook
targetNotebook.description: Items above the routing threshold are moved into this notebook as individual documents.
targetNotebook.none: Do not process (keep in Siyuan Inbox)

messages.testMessage: This is a test message from SiYuan Inbox+.
messages.testWritten: Test message written to bound document

errors.noTargetDoc: Bind a valid SiYuan document first
errors.BotTokenRequiredError: Telegram Bot Token is not configured
errors.InvalidProxyResponseError: Invalid proxy response. Please check network settings.
errors.writeMessageError: Failed to write into SiYuan document
